headline: ImageSource Named a 2026 Everest Group IDP Star Performer
summary: ImageSource, the maker of the ILINX® intelligent automation platform, has been named a 2026 Star Performer in the Everest Group Intelligent Document Processing (IDP) Products PEAK Matrix® Assessment. The designation, awarded to just four providers out of more than 30 evaluated globally, honors organizations demonstrating the strongest year-over-year movement on both market impact and vision and capability dimensions. headline: Firstsource Named a Leader by Everest Group and NelsonHall in 2026 Healthcare Payer Assessments
summary: MUMBAI, India, April 02, 2026--Firstsource Solutions Limited (NSE:FSL, BSE:532809), an RP-Sanjiv Goenka Group company, has been named a Leader in Everest Group Healthcare Payer Intelligent Operations PEAK Matrix® Assessment 2026 and a Leader in the Overall Market Segment of NelsonHall’s Healthcare Payer Agility & Innovation NEAT Evaluation 2026.
